title: asteriscus schultzii
intro: Asteriscus schultzii, also known as Desert Heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to the deserts of North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Asteriscus schultzii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Asteriscus schultzii typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
